creator: harald.prettner@tugraz.at
text:
cannot complete "pkg install okular"

~ % date
Mi. 20 Feb. 2019 14:05:43 CET

~ % freebsd-version
11.2-RELEASE-p9

~ # pkg install okular

5 MiB to be downloaded.

Proceed with this action? [y/N]: y
